dataset: Odoo 17.0 HR Module - Official Demo Data
case_id: hr.job record for 'Marketing and Community Manager'

pi_items.source: Odoo HR official demo data (hr/data/hr_demo.xml). Confirmed in environment evidence_docs/README.md lines 31, 33, 39 as existing job position assigned to employees Eli Lambert, Jeffrey Kelly, and Rachel Perry. Also confirmed in setup_data.py comments lines 13-14.

Task-specific configuration value. Metadata defines the goal state for the task. Field name 'alias_name' is a standard Char field in Odoo hr_recruitment module (confirmed by web search). Used in setup_task.sh line 40 and export_result.sh lines 41, 47 to read/write email alias.

Odoo HR official demo data. Confirmed in evidence_docs/README.md line 36 as one of 20 official demo employees: 'Marc Demo | Management / Research & Development | Experienced Developer'. Also listed in setup_data.py lines 7-10 as part of official demo employee roster.

Task-specific configuration value. Metadata defines the goal state for the task (Expected New Employees/Target). Field name 'no_of_recruitment' is a standard field in Odoo hr_recruitment module (confirmed by web search and used in setup_task.sh lines 30, 42 and export_result.sh line 41, 48).

privileged_info_summary: The task configures an Odoo 17 HR job position using official demo data. The target job position 'Marketing and Community Manager' is a real job position in Odoo's bundled demo data. The recruiter 'Marc Demo' is one of 20 official demo employees in the environment. The task modifies the job record to set: email alias to 'social-guru' (alias_name field), recruiter to Marc Demo (user_id field), and hiring target to 3 (no_of_recruitment field). All field names and entity references are authentic and correspond to standard Odoo hr_recruitment module fields and official demo data.
